name: convert-python-sdk-release-tooling
description: Release automation tooling for the Convert Python SDK (semantic-release). Dev-only — the published wheel/sdist keeps httpx as the only runtime dependency and contains no Node artifacts (pyproject.toml excludes package.json / release.config.mjs / yarn.lock / node_modules from the sdist, and the wheel target is packages = ["src/convert_sdk"]).
